Following the afore referred dictum, this Court Judgment reported Need سئا سلعنف Disic & Sesعn ففشك Laloss d20( عطعI MLD 1938) entertained time barred application under Order IX Rule 13 of the CPC for setting aside decree for appointment of guardian of minor when in the given circumstances of the case the welfarue of the minor so required Keeping in view the principles laid down in the afore relered judgments, held that evell application fur condonation of delay in filing appeal in guardianship matters is be decided keeping in view welfare of the minor even if the said ground has been raised by party or not Stcond such 54٨l- فلخع قدنق1حعاPا As Ihe impugned order passed by the appellate court is silent as to whether it has considered aspecet of welfare of the minor or not it would be uppropriate to Sناl-aside Ihe impugned order dated 09.08.2018 and remand tne Inatter Io the learned Appellate Cour for rehearing and re deciding Ine BaI afresh keeping view the aspect of the maner.
